entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE AND VARIABILITY
entities.description: Environmental fluctuations and long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agriculture.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: ADAPTIVE FARMING
entities.description: Agricultural practices adjusted to respond to climate change and variability.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Release of gases that trap heat in the atmosphere, contributing to global warming.

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An integrated approach to managing landscapes to address the interlinked challenges of food security and climate change.

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY ACTION RESEARCH
entities.description: An approach to research that involves stakeholders in the research process to solve problems and create change.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH FOR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Research focused on creating scalable options for agricultural development.

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION
entities.description: Data and knowledge regarding climate patterns used to inform agricultural decisions.

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART VILLAGES
entities.description: Territorial units where CSA technologies and practices are tested and implemented.

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of an ecosystem to respond to a perturbation or disturbance by resisting damage and recovering quickly.

entities.name: POPULATION RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of human populations to withstand and recover from climate-related shocks.

entities.name: VOCATIONAL AND ACADEMIC TRAINING
entities.description: Educational programs used to strengthen the capacity of researchers, farmers, and students.

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD PLANNING
entities.description: The process of planning economic activities to ensure sustainable living standards.

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL CHANGE
entities.description: Changes in the physical and biological characteristics of the environment.

entities.name: SOCIAL CHANGE
entities.description: Alterations in the social structures and cultural behaviors of a community.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the CSV approach was co-implemented.

entities.name: CCAFS-WEST AFRICA PROGRAM
entities.description: A regional program focused on climate change, agriculture, and food security in West Africa.

entities.name: WORLD AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: An international organization focusing on the role of trees in sustainable land management.

entities.name: SCALABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a technology or practice to be expanded or applied on a larger scale.

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of developing and strengthening the skills, instincts, and abilities of people and communities.
